Interface Base_Soul

All Known Implementing Classes:
Arcanus, Astral, BaseBlack, BaseBlue, BaseCafe, BaseCyan, BaseGreen, BaseMocha, BaseNone, BaseOrange, BasePurple, BaseRed, BaseYellow, Black, Blue, Cafe, Green, Leaf, Mocha, None, Orange, Purple, Red, Yellow
public interface Base_Soul

    • AbilityTwo

      void AbilityTwo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack ability_item) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Ability Two - An ability that can be triggered using an ITEM and/or with Inputs
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle Ability Two for
      ability_item - ItemStack used in ability usage
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - if there's an error with MineSkin
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - if there's an error with data request

    • AbilityTwo

      default void AbilityTwo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack ability_item, boolean is_imbue) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Ability Two - An ability that can be triggered using an ITEM and/or with Inputs
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle Ability Two for
      ability_item - ItemStack used in ability usage
      is_imbue - checking if it's imbued
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - if there's an error with MineSkin
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - if there's an error with the data request

      Ability Two Cooldown Time
      Returns:
      Cooldown time in milliseconds

    • AbilityOne_Cooldown

      long AbilityOne_Cooldown(Object given)
      Ability One Cooldown Time
      Parameters:
      given - Given object, depends on the moveset, could be a player
      Returns:
      Cooldown time in milliseconds

    • ActivePassive

      void ActivePassive(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Active Passive - A passive that requires a condition to activate (like sneaking or specific stats)
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle active passive for

    • effective_cooldown

      default long effective_cooldown(long base_cooldown, UUID playerUUID)
      Chronos Artifact Cooldown Reduction - If the player has the Chronos artifact, reduce the cooldown by 30%
      Parameters:
      base_cooldown - Cooldown time in milliseconds
      playerUUID - Player UUID to check for the Chronos artifact
      Returns:
      Cooldown time in milliseconds, reduced by 30% if the player has the Chronos artifact

    • can_ability

      default boolean can_ability(long cooldown, HashMap<UUID,Long> cooldown_list, UUID player)
      Boolean check to see if the player can use the ability
      Parameters:
      cooldown - Cooldown time in milliseconds, given from AbilityOne_Cooldown or AbilityTwo_Cooldown
      cooldown_list - Cooldown list to check against, given from AbilityOneCooldowns or AbilityTwoCooldowns within Util
      player - Player to check for ability use
      Returns:
      boolean if player can use ability
      See Also:
      • AbilityOne_Cooldown(Object)
      • AbilityTwo_Cooldown()

    • alive

      default boolean alive(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Checks if the player is alive
      Parameters:
      player - Player to check for alive status
      Returns:
      boolean if player is alive

    • ImbueActive

      default boolean ImbueActive(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Checks if the player is imbued
      Parameters:
      player - Player to check for imbued status
      Returns:
      boolean if player is imbued

    • getOwnersImbuedItemInHand

      default org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getOwnersImbuedItemInHand(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Checks if the player is imbued by the soul owner
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner
      Returns:
      boolean if player is imbued by the soul owner

    • isImbuedBy

      default boolean isImbuedBy(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Determines if the provided item is imbued by the specified soul owner.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check if it is imbued.
      soulOwner - The Player who is being checked as the potential soul owner of the imbued item.
      Returns:
      true if the item is imbued and the specified soulOwner is among the players who imbued it; false otherwise.

    • getImbuePlayer

      default org.bukkit.entity.Player getImbuePlayer(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Gets the player who is imbued by the specified soul owner.
      Parameters:
      player - Player to check for imbued player
      Returns:
      Player who is imbued by the specified soul owner, or null if no such player is found.

    • canUseLiteOne

      default boolean canUseLiteOne(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Lite methods are used by dead soul owners and executed through the current imbued-item holder.
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner
      Returns:
      boolean if the player can use the lite method

    • canUseLiteTwo

      default boolean canUseLiteTwo(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Lite methods are used by dead soul owners and executed through the current imbued-item holder. Checks if the ability can be used
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner
      Returns:
      boolean if the player can use the lite method

    • isValidLiteLink

      default boolean isValidLiteLink(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Checks if the provided player is a valid link between the holder and the soul owner.
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner
      Returns:
      boolean if the player is a valid link between the holder and the soul owner

    • AbilityOneLite

      default void AbilityOneLite(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner)
      Lite method for Ability One.
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner

    • AbilityTwoLite

      default void AbilityTwoLite(org.bukkit.entity.Player holder, org.bukkit.entity.Player soulOwner, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack abilityItem) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Lite method for Ability Two.
      Parameters:
      holder - Player that is holding the imbued item
      soulOwner - Player that is the soul owner
      abilityItem - ItemStack used in ability usage
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
